title: Adobe India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Adobe India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Adobe India Holdings Services in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
